猪脚牛逼但很平衡没有崩数据 而且比其他书好的一点就是不吊丝 男女平等一律杀伐果断没有某些下头窝囊作者写的男的杀漂亮女人放走的私货桥段","text_exts":[{"e":47,"s":43,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774288070F6E747FB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227292420701938680639%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227255936586997566505%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697900042,"group_id":"7255936586997566505","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不忘初心，任时光流转","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N34VdScDy1rLP/T9yXDI+JhPwcxEvEYBregGhha6gg1O","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2400986027000877","user_name":"不计较落寞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2400986027000877","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255936586997566505","book_info":{"abstract":"【已更新至诸神黄昏与现实融合】
【常规虚拟网游+超神级天赋+杀伐果决+剧情流+无女主】
　　重生回到诸神黄昏开服之前，一切都还有重新来过的机会，曾经的遗憾，都将一一弥补。
　　前世十年未曾觉醒的天赋，如今凭借前世记忆，获得神级天赋觉醒石，开启超神级天赋！
　　每次普攻永久增加一点生命值！
　　普攻造成自身最大生命值1%的真伤！
　　有此天赋，何人能挡！
　　当普通玩家还在想着怎么快速升到10级的时候，林天浩已经开始筹备摧毁新手村了。
　　当普通玩家还在跪舔主城导师，想要多学一个技能时，林天浩已经带着东方古国复苏！
　　超神级天赋，超神级隐藏职业，诸神的赐福……
　　神级刺客:妈妈耶，我一套连招打掉了雪帝1%生命值，他一箭就秒杀了我。
　　神级盾战:我护甲百万，血量五千万，自当横推十方，何人能挡……等等，雪帝怎么一箭就清空了我的血条。
　　当一个弓箭手血条有亿点点厚，真伤有亿点点高的时候，这游戏，就有些朴实无华了。
　　林天浩:我无敌，你们随意！
　　【传奇诞生，诸神颤抖，东方古国，弑神而生，这里，有不一样的热血情怀！】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8431b2c5870f753360e50587cd4bec2a","author":"撼动猩","author_id":"","book_id":"7255936586997566505","book_name":"普攻永久加生命，阁下如何应对？","book_short_name":"雪帝传","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"29万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7255936706510717499","read_count":"289198","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4595675"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"2232","tags":"游戏体育,重生,网游","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c6d409ec6e3bf0a822328854a90ea5af~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779472070&x-signature=0JmdJ83WNHdzJtzNYOB8syHYsAA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"826423979807048","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.729311e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324014750797A3ED700C8F6E747FB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":250,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17292,"reply_count":17,"show_pv":140223},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7294576820317012777","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真是太棒了！我简直停不下来，每一页都让我着迷。作者的写作风格真是独一无二，让人仿佛置身于故事中。故事情节紧凑有趣，充满了惊喜和悬疑，让我一直猜测下一步会发生什么。而且，书中的角色塑造得非常生动，每个人物都有自己独特的个性和故事，让我对他们产生了深厚的情感这本书不仅仅是一部娱乐作品，它还蕴含了许多深刻的思考和启示。作者通过故事中的情节和人物，探讨了一些重要的人生价值观和道德问题，让我对自己的生活有了更深入的思考。同时，书中也融入了一些幽默和智慧的元素，让我在阅读的过程中不禁会心一笑。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698402621,"group_id":"7255936586997566505","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxXrd41PxM/k8ue0DJCsAm2pGcr/WrxJRCA5iPDgSm16","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dff6ebf5c4324e3b9232220bbe734766~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880851&x-signature=b87zqSFf6kXv84b3Uq%2FLe0iFM4U%3D","user_id":"1834434667228397","user_name":"喵喵僵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1834434667228397","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255936586997566505","book_info":{"abstract":"【已更新至诸神黄昏与现实融合】

　　重生回到诸神黄昏开服之前，一切都还有重新来过的机会，曾经的遗憾，都将一一弥补。

　　每次普攻永久增加一点生命值！
　　普攻造成自身最大生命值1%的真伤！

　　当普通玩家还在想着怎么快速升到10级的时候，林天浩已经开始筹备摧毁新手村了。
　　当普通玩家还在跪舔主城导师，想要多学一个技能时，林天浩已经带着东方古国复苏！
　　超神级天赋，超神级隐藏职业，诸神的赐福……
　　神级刺客:妈妈耶，我一套连招打掉了雪帝1%生命值，他一箭就秒杀了我。

就是撸啊撸的心之钢加巨型九头蛇，但着实给了我一个惊喜。小说主还是以爽文为主，但是越往后，让主角完成任务，成长变强，设置了更长的时间和难度，阅读的时候不仅是体验主角变强的爽感，还有剧情的起伏带来的紧张感，剧情逻辑性比较自洽。总而言之，是一部质量比较高的网文，非常适合打发时间。","text_exts":[{"e":29,"s":26,"text":"心之钢","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BF%83%E4%B9%8B%E9%92%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774288070F6E747FB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227294684095987385126%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227255936586997566505%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BF%83%E4%B9%8B%E9%92%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698427342,"group_id":"7255936586997566505","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/ittYwBl6PoVQUBVFSe1+JTBsL/CzIeIjZhtY9aRA3r","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1890805795261245","user_name":"用户18908057"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1890805795261245","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255936586997566505","book_info":{"abstract":"【已更新至诸神黄昏与现实融合】
